column1: WILD PROTOCOL  |  UPSELL EMAIL SEQUENCES  |  T1->T2 and T2->T3
Triggered automatically after course completion. Designed to convert without feeling like a pitch.
TIER 1 -> TIER 2 UPSELL SEQUENCE  (triggered: Day 30 after Tier 1 purchase)

column4: One month in — what your data says about your WILD progress
column7: Acknowledge their journey. Reference their likely progress (5-30% success rate). Frame the ceiling: there are techniques that can double their success rate that aren't in Foundations. Specifically mention: DEILD, galantamine stack, hardware integration. No hard sell yet.
column12: Link to Tier 2 sales page. CTA: "See what's in the Advanced course."

column4: The fastest way to go from 30% to 70% WILD success rate
column7: Specific, data-driven email. "Most Tier 1 practitioners plateau around 30% success rate. Here's exactly why and what breaks the plateau." Detail the advanced techniques. Show the gap between Tier 1 and Tier 2 capabilities.
column12: Direct CTA: "Unlock the Advanced Practitioner course — $100." Include 72-hour urgency if running promo.

column4: Real question: what would you do with 4 hours of lucid time per week?
column7: Shift to aspiration, not technique. "Tier 2 practitioners average 90-120 min of lucid time per session vs 15-30 min for Tier 1 students. What would you actually do with that?" Use concrete examples: the architect, the entrepreneur, the programmer.
column12: Final CTA with specific outcome: "Double your lucid duration. Join 200+ Advanced Practitioners."

column1: TIER 2 -> TIER 3 UPSELL SEQUENCE  (triggered: Day 60 after Tier 2 purchase)

column4: You've built the skill. Here's how to use it at the highest level.
column7: Position Tier 3 as graduation, not just more content. "You now have a skill that most people don't even know exists. Tier 3 is about applying it at full depth — and being part of the 30-person cohort that's doing the same." Introduce the retreat concept.
column12: Link to Tier 3 page. CTA: "See what's in the Master program and the annual retreat."

column4: The annual WILD retreat: 3 days, 30 practitioners, one shared goal
column7: Deep dive on the retreat. Paint the picture: 30 serious practitioners, 3 days of deep practice and community. Exclusive. Small. Done once per year. "This is what Tier 3 unlocks." Include the 5-module advanced content as a secondary draw.
column12: CTA: "Join the Master program — $200. Retreat access included." Early bird angle if applicable.

column4: An honest question: what's the ceiling of your current practice?
column7: Metacognitive challenge. "You've hit a consistent 50-70% success rate. You have a system. What's next?" Introduce the concept of ceiling vs expansion. Tier 3 opens the next ceiling. Teaching, community leadership, and the retreat are the new frontier.
column12: Final offer: "Last invitation to join the Master program before we close enrollment." Scarcity if honest.
